perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a tan bucket hat and a black top sits on a wooden floor crying, surrounded by lottery invoices; a second woman in a beret enters the frame to comfort her and presents a pink gift box. (2) Close-up shots show four heart-shaped cheesecakes in flavors of lemon, matcha, chocolate, and original, decorated with cute smiley faces on the lids. (3) The two women are shown eating the cakes at a kitchen counter, expressing exaggerated delight and giving thumbs-up gestures. (4) A DIY segment shows hands pouring rum from a 'Santiago de Cuba' bottle into a glass with cherries, then topping the cheesecake with the soaked fruit. (5) The video concludes with the two women holding several branded gift boxes and a paper bag, pointing at a smartphone screen to demonstrate an online purchase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with the sound of a woman crying loudly, which is quickly overlaid by upbeat, fast-tempo background music. (2) Two female voices speak in high-pitched, energetic tones, alternating between describing the flavors and making exaggerated 'Mmm' sounds of satisfaction. (3) Audible 'clinking' sounds of metal spoons hitting the heart-shaped tins occur throughout the eating sequence. (4) A consistent, bubbly background track continues as the voices explain the 72% cheese content and the brand location. (5) The audio ends with a clear, direct-to-camera address inviting viewers to participate in a giveaway.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 'Invoice hasn't won for three years in a row' (Sad tone). (2) Hook: 'Don't be sad, come eat some healing cheesecake!' (Encouraging). (3) Functional: 'Summer must-eat: Sour and sweet Lemon' and 'Shizuoka Matcha from Japan' (Informational). (4) Decorative: '72% super thick cheesecake' (Emphasis). (5) Functional: 'Taichung's newest souvenir: Mimian 72% thick cheesecake' (Branding). (6) Call to Action: 'Like and comment to tell me your unlucky moment' (Engagement).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Sadness) -> Solution (Cake Reveal) -> Flavor Montage (Eating) -> Creative DIY -> Outro (Giveaway/CTA)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female with long black hair wearing a tan bucket hat and a black off-shoulder top; one female with long black hair wearing a black beret and a grey long-sleeve dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a living room with a large brown leather sofa to a bright, modern kitchen studio with a grey marble-patterned counter.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional endorsement for the 'Mimian' (瞇瞇眼) brand's cheesecake. It uses a relatable emotional hook (the frustration of not winning the lottery) to position the dessert as a 'healing' reward. The content highlights the variety of flavors, the high quality (72% cheese content), and creative serving suggestions (adding alcohol and fruit) to appeal to adult consumers, concluding with a giveaway to drive engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstration, brand name prominently displayed, mention of specific store location in Taichung, and an official giveaway.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Exaggerated facial expressions and high-energy vocal delivery characteristic of Taiwanese food influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'healing' (療癒) as a keyword targets young adults seeking emotional comfort through consumption. The beat-synced editing and heart-shaped visuals optimize the video for social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels.
